name: OAW Indoor Sports Complex
address: 5330 S Racine Ave, New Berlin, WI 53146
about: OAW Indoor Sports Complex is a comprehensive indoor athletic facility offering a wide range of sports and fitness programs. The complex includes a dedicated golf simulator, providing an opportunity for year-round play regardless of weather. They offer both individual simulator access and organized leagues, indicating a focus on both casual play and structured competition. The facility also features membership options, team training, and event rental spaces, positioning itself as a versatile venue for various athletic needs. It appears to cater to both individual athletes and groups looking for space to train, compete, or host events.
why_golfers_like_it: Offers indoor golf leagues for competitive play and social engagement
Provides year-round access to golf, unaffected by outdoor weather conditions
Part of a larger multi-sport complex, offering diverse athletic amenities in one location
Includes event and team rental options for group outings and corporate activities

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned, BYOB likely permitted
No mention of an on-site bar or alcohol service

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you need to bring your own. It is recommended to call ahead or check their booking site for details on equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of an on-site kitchen or bar. The facility appears to allow outside food and drink, though it's best to confirm with the venue directly.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing information for an 18-hole round. Durations can vary based on simulator software, number of players, and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, OAW Indoor Sports Complex offers numerous youth programs including baseball, basketball, softball, and various camps, indicating a strong commitment to accommodating children and families.
